title: Sterilization system comprising independent pump module and sterilization method thereof
abstract: A sterilization system comprises a chamber module and an independent pump module that is external to the chamber module in an independent form, is connected to the chamber module, and has a built-in pump, wherein the chamber module comprises a chamber built in the chamber module and storing a target object and a vaporizer built in the chamber module and connected to the chamber to supply a vaporized sterilant, wherein the chamber built in the chamber module is connected to the pump built in the independent pump module and exhausted.
claims: 1. A sterilization pump assembly comprising: a pump module including a pump evacuating internal air of a chamber included in a first housing of a chamber module in which a target object is stored and a sterilization process of the target object is performed, in a second housing; and a connector configured to connect the pump module to the chamber module so that the arrangement changes independently, and to move the internal air between the chamber module and the pump module, wherein the pump module comprises a path through which the connector connected from the outside of the second housing of the pump module is connected to the inside of the second housing of the pump module to be connected to the pump.
